name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: ProductManager
entity_types.description: AI product managers focusing on model integration and user experience design.

attributes.name: specialization
attributes.description: Specific area of expertise like LLM or Computer Vision.

attributes.name: experience_years
attributes.description: Years of experience in product management.

attributes.name: current_project
attributes.description: Current main product or initiative being worked on.

entity_types.name: CompanyExecutive
entity_types.description: C-level executives or heads leading AI ventures and strategy.

attributes.name: position_title
attributes.description: Official job title within the organization.

attributes.name: department
attributes.description: Department or division they lead.

attributes.name: public_profile
attributes.description: Level of public visibility and media presence.

entity_types.name: TechResearcher
entity_types.description: Academics or engineers publishing technical papers and models.

attributes.name: research_focus
attributes.description: Primary research direction such as Diffusion or Transformers.

attributes.name: publication_count
attributes.description: Number of published papers or technical reports.

attributes.name: institution
attributes.description: Affiliated university, lab, or company.

entity_types.name: MediaHost
entity_types.description: Podcast hosts or journalists covering tech news and industry trends.

attributes.name: platform_handle
attributes.description: Social media handle or podcast channel name.

attributes.name: audience_size
attributes.description: Estimated number of followers or listeners.

attributes.name: content_type
attributes.description: Type of content produced such as interviews or analysis.

entity_types.name: AIStartup
entity_types.description: Early-stage companies developing specific AI applications or products.

attributes.name: funding_stage
attributes.description: Current investment stage like Seed or Series A.

attributes.name: product_category
attributes.description: Main product category such as绘画 or Chatbot.

attributes.name: founding_year
attributes.description: Year the company was established.

entity_types.name: TechPlatform
entity_types.description: Infrastructure providers offering model APIs or development tools.

attributes.name: service_type
attributes.description: Type of service provided like API or Model Hub.

attributes.name: api_access
attributes.description: Whether public API access is available.

attributes.name: pricing_model
attributes.description: Cost structure for using their services.

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: Organizations distributing content or hosting podcasts and articles.

attributes.name: media_format
attributes.description: Format of distribution like Podcast or Website.

attributes.name: distribution_channel
attributes.description: Primary channels used to reach audience.

attributes.name: target_audience
attributes.description: Intended demographic or professional group.

entity_types.name: CompetitorOrg
entity_types.description: Established tech giants competing for market share and users.

attributes.name: market_share
attributes.description: Estimated percentage of market control.

attributes.name: main_product
attributes.description: Flagship product competing with new entrants.

attributes.name: global_presence
attributes.description: Whether operations span multiple countries.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any natural person capable of speaking or interacting on social media.

attributes.name: display_label
attributes.description: Publicly visible name or alias.

attributes.name: bio
attributes.description: Short description of background or interests.

attributes.name: activity_level
attributes.description: Frequency of posting or engagement.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organizational entity capable of official communication or action.

attributes.name: org_label
attributes.description: Official registered or business name.

attributes.name: headquarters
attributes.description: Location of main office or base.

attributes.name: industry_sector
attributes.description: Primary industry or field of operation.

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: Indicates employment relationship between a person and an organization.

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Indicates academic or professional affiliation without direct employment.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates media coverage of an organization or individual.

edge_types.name: COMPETES_WITH
edge_types.description: Indicates market competition between two organizations.

edge_types.name: FOLLOWS
edge_types.description: Indicates social media following relationship between entities.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Indicates a reply or comment from one entity to another.

edge_types.name: MENTIONS
edge_types.description: Indicates public discussion or reference in content.

edge_types.name: INFLUENCES
edge_types.description: Indicates opinion leadership or impact on sentiment.

analysis_summary: 基于文本内容，识别出 AI 行业舆论模拟中的关键主体。设计了 8 个具体实体类型（产品经理、高管、研究员、媒体主持、初创公司、技术平台、媒体机构、竞争对手）和 2 个兜底类型（个人、组织），覆盖文中提到的张涛、王小川、光年之外、小宇宙等核心角色。关系类型设计为 8 种，涵盖工作、竞争、报道、互动等社媒常见行为，支持模拟信息传播路径和舆论影响。属性设计避免保留字，聚焦于身份、业务和影响力特征。
